quotes.text: 冲一冲、稳一稳、保一保。前两个志愿冲梦想，中间稳住，最后两个保底。
quotes.text_en: Reach, match, safety. First two choices reach for your dream, middle ones are steady, last two are safety nets.
quotes.context: 平行志愿填报的经典策略

quotes.text: 服从调剂一定要勾！不勾服从调剂，你就是在拿自己的前途赌博。
quotes.text_en: Always check 'accept adjustment'! Not checking it means you're gambling with your future.
quotes.context: 强调服从调剂的重要性，避免滑档
